## 

# Q2M COATING APPLICATOR

**DEDICATED SOFT COATING APPLICATOR**

Designed entirely for coating application in mind, the Q²M Coating Applicator are our takes in soft sponge applicator. Its double sided structure offers a suede side for precise application and a short hair microfiber style on the other side. No sharp edges, no risk of damage.

### PRECISE AND HANDY

Q²M CoatingApplicator has been designed to allow both enthusiast and professional, a safer and faster coating application on all types of surfaces. 2 types of high quality microfibres are seamlessly wrapped around a high density sponge for maximum precision and safety. The applicator is offered in 2 or 10 pack version.
